---
title: ""
page-layout: full
engine: markdown
---

::: page-header
# Publications {#publications}
:::

::: jump-nav
[Publications](#publications){.jump-link} [Peer review](#peer-review){.jump-link}
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{=html}
<style>
.pub-layout { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 160px; gap: 2.5rem; align-items: start; }
.pub-main { min-width: 0; }
.pub-sidebar { position: sticky; top: 80px; }
.sidebar-section { background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 1.1rem; box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); }
.sidebar-label { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.07em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-muted); display: block; margin-bottom: 0.6rem; }
.sidebar-links { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.35rem; }
.sidebar-link { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--navy) !important; text-decoration: none !important; padding: 0.3rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid var(--border); transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s, transform 0.15s; display: block; text-align: center; }
.sidebar-link:hover { background: var(--tag-bg); border-color: var(--navy); transform: translateY(-1px); }
.pub-year-head { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--accent); margin: 2rem 0 0.75rem 0; padding-bottom: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--border); display: block; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; }
.pub-entry-block { padding: 1rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); display: flex; gap: 0.85rem; align-items: flex-start; }
.pub-entry-block:last-of-type { border-bottom: none; }
.pub-favicon { width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--bg); flex-shrink: 0; object-fit: contain; padding: 3px; margin-top: 2px; }
.pub-favicon-fallback { width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--bg); flex-shrink: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-top: 2px; color: var(--accent); }
.pub-entry-text { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
.pub-title-link { font-size: 0.97rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--navy) !important; text-decoration: none !important; line-height: 1.55; display: inline; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; background-image: linear-gradient(var(--accent), var(--accent)); background-size: 0% 1px; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-position: left bottom; transition: background-size 0.25s ease, color 0.15s; }
.pub-title-link:hover { color: var(--accent) !important; background-size: 100% 1px; }
.pub-journal-link { display: inline; font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--text-muted) !important; font-style: italic; font-weight: 400; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; text-decoration: none !important; transition: color 0.15s; }
.pub-journal-link:hover { color: var(--accent) !important; }
.pub-meta-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem; margin-top: 0.4rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.pub-cite-btn { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.03em; color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 999px; padding: 0.18rem 0.6rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s, color 0.15s, transform 0.15s; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.6; }
.pub-cite-btn:hover { background: var(--tag-bg); border-color: var(--navy); color: var(--navy); transform: translateY(-1px); }
.pub-cite-btn.copied { background: #e8f5ee; border-color: #2d7a4f; color: #2d7a4f; }
.pub-loading { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--text-muted); padding: 1rem 0; }
.pub-section-heading { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 1.55rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; margin-top: 0; }
.pub-footer-row { margin-top: 1.75rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.75rem; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding-top: 1rem; }
.pub-synced-note { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-muted); letter-spacing: 0.02em; }
.pub-synced-note a { color: var(--text-muted); text-decoration: underline; }
.pub-scholar-link { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--navy) !important; text-decoration: none !important; padding: 0.3rem 0.85rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 999px; transition: background 0.18s, border-color 0.18s; }
.pub-scholar-link:hover { background: var(--tag-bg); border-color: var(--navy); }
.peer-review-section { margin-top: 2rem; padding-top: 1.5rem; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
.peer-review-section h2 { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 1.55rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
.peer-review-section p { font-size: 1rem; color: #2a2a2a; line-height: 1.75; }
@media (max-width: 860px) { .pub-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .pub-sidebar { display: none; } }
</style>

<div class="pub-layout">

  <div class="pub-main">
    <h2 id="publications" class="pub-section-heading">Publications</h2>
    <div id="orcid-pubs"><p class="pub-loading">Loading publications from ORCID…</p></div>
    <div class="peer-review-section">
      <h2 id="peer-review">Peer review</h2>
      <p>I contribute to peer review for journals in psychology, behavioural science, and digital health. Recent reviews include work for <em>Behaviour &amp; Information Technology</em> and <em>Scientific Reports</em>.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-section">
      <span class="sidebar-label">Find me online</span>
      <div class="sidebar-links">
        <a href="https://orcid.org/0009-0000-1020-2333" class="sidebar-link" target="_blank">ORCID</a>
        <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ZEvUL_kAAAAJ&hl=en" class="sidebar-link" target="_blank">Google Scholar</a>
        <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Connor-Conkey-Morrison" class="sidebar-link" target="_blank">ResearchGate</a>
        <a href="https://digitalminds.au/connor-conkey-morrison/" class="sidebar-link" target="_blank">DigitalMinds</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ccicm" class="sidebar-link" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
const ORCID_ID    = '0009-0000-1020-2333';
const SCHOLAR_URL = 'https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ZEvUL_kAAAAJ&hl=en';
const MAX_PUBS    = 6;

// DOI prefix → publisher domain for favicon lookup
const DOI_DOMAINS = {
  '10.1016': 'sciencedirect.com', '10.1007': 'springer.com', '10.1038': 'nature.com',
  '10.1186': 'biomedcentral.com', '10.1002': 'wiley.com',    '10.1111': 'wiley.com',
  '10.1080': 'tandfonline.com',   '10.4324': 'routledge.com','10.1037': 'apa.org',
  '10.1027': 'hogrefe.com',       '10.1177': 'sagepub.com',  '10.1093': 'oup.com',
  '10.1017': 'cambridge.org',     '10.1371': 'plos.org',     '10.1136': 'bmj.com',
  '10.3389': 'frontiersin.org',   '10.3390': 'mdpi.com',     '10.1521': 'guilford.com',
  '10.1159': 'karger.com',        '10.1515': 'degruyter.com','10.1108': 'emerald.com',
};

function getBookSvg() {
  const c = (window.CCM_COLORS && window.CCM_COLORS.accent) || '#c05a4a';
  return `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="${c}" stroke-width="1.75" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M2 3h6a4 4 0 0 1 4 4v14a3 3 0 0 0-3-3H2z"/><path d="M22 3h-6a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v14a3 3 0 0 1 3-3h7z"/></svg>`;
}

function pubIconHtml(doi) {
  const prefix = doi ? doi.split('/')[0] : null;
  const domain = prefix ? (DOI_DOMAINS[prefix] || null) : null;
  if (domain) {
    return `<img class="pub-favicon" src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=${domain}&sz=64" alt="" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.nextElementSibling.style.display='flex';"><div class="pub-favicon-fallback" style="display:none;">${getBookSvg()}</div>`;
  }
  return `<div class="pub-favicon-fallback">${getBookSvg()}</div>`;
}

// Build a journal-level URL from Crossref metadata + publisher heuristics
async function fetchJournalUrl(doi) {
  if (!doi) return null;
  try {
    const res = await fetch(`https://api.crossref.org/works/${encodeURIComponent(doi)}?mailto=connorconkeymorrison@gmail.com`);
    if (!res.ok) return null;
    const work = (await res.json()).message;
    if (!work) return null;
    const issns     = work.ISSN || [];
    const publisher = (work.publisher || '').toLowerCase();
    const title     = work['container-title']?.[0] || '';
    const issn      = issns[0] || '';

    if (publisher.includes('elsevier') || publisher.includes('sciencedirect')) {
      const m = doi.match(/10\.1016\/j\.([a-z]+)\./);
      if (m) return `https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/${m[1]}`;
      return title ? `https://www.sciencedirect.com/search?pub=${encodeURIComponent(title)}` : null;
    }
    if (publisher.includes('springer') || publisher.includes('nature')) {
      return issn ? `https://link.springer.com/search?query=&search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=${issn}` : null;
    }
    if (publisher.includes('wiley')) {
      return issn ? `https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/${issn.replace('-','')}` : null;
    }
    if (publisher.includes('taylor') || publisher.includes('routledge') || publisher.includes('informa')) {
      return issn ? `https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/${issn}` : null;
    }
    if (publisher.includes('sage')) {
      return issn ? `https://journals.sagepub.com/home/${issn}` : null;
    }
    if (publisher.includes('oxford') || publisher.includes('oup')) {
      const slug = title.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-');
      return `https://academic.oup.com/${slug}`;
    }
    if (publisher.includes('american psychological') || publisher.includes('apa ')) {
      return issn ? `https://www.apa.org/pubs/journals/${issn}` : null;
    }
    if (publisher.includes('frontiers')) {
      const slug = title.toLowerCase().replace('frontiers in ','').replace(/\s+/g,'-');
      return `https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/${slug}`;
    }
    if (publisher.includes('plos')) return 'https://journals.plos.org/plosone/';

    // Generic fallback: DOI itself
    return `https://doi.org/${doi}`;
  } catch { return null; }
}

function formatAuthors(contributors) {
  if (!contributors || contributors.length === 0) return null;
  const names = contributors
    .filter(c => (c['contributor-attributes']?.['contributor-role'] || 'author').toLowerCase() === 'author')
    .map(c => {
      const credit = c['credit-name']?.value || '';
      if (!credit) return null;
      const parts = credit.trim().split(/\s+/);
      if (parts.length >= 2) {
        const last = parts[parts.length - 1];
        const inits = parts.slice(0, -1).map(p => p[0].toUpperCase() + '.').join(' ');
        return `${last}, ${inits}`;
      }
      return credit;
    }).filter(Boolean);
  if (!names.length) return null;
  if (names.length <= 20) return names.join(', ');
  return names.slice(0, 19).join(', ') + ', … ' + names[names.length - 1];
}

function buildAPA(w) {
  const authors = w.authors || 'Conkey-Morrison, C.';
  const journal = w.journal ? `${w.journal}` : '';
  const vol     = w.volume  ? `, ${w.volume}` : '';
  const issue   = w.issue   ? `(${w.issue})`  : '';
  const pages   = w.pages   ? `, ${w.pages}`  : '';
  const doi     = w.doi     ? ` https://doi.org/${w.doi}` : '';
  return `${authors} (${w.year || 'n.d.'}). ${w.title}.${journal ? ' ' + journal + vol + issue + pages + '.' : ''}${doi}`;
}

function buildRIS(w) {
  const lines = ['TY  - JOUR'];
  (w.authors || 'Conkey-Morrison, Connor').split(', ').filter(Boolean).forEach(a => lines.push(`AU  - ${a}`));
  lines.push(`TI  - ${w.title || ''}`);
  if (w.journal) lines.push(`JO  - ${w.journal}`);
  if (w.year)    lines.push(`PY  - ${w.year}`);
  if (w.volume)  lines.push(`VL  - ${w.volume}`);
  if (w.issue)   lines.push(`IS  - ${w.issue}`);
  if (w.pages)   lines.push(`SP  - ${w.pages}`);
  if (w.doi)     lines.push(`DO  - ${w.doi}`, `UR  - https://doi.org/${w.doi}`);
  lines.push('ER  - ');
  return lines.join('\r\n');
}

// Global store for cite/download handlers
const PUB_WORKS = [];
function copyApa(idx) {
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(buildAPA(PUB_WORKS[idx])).then(() => {
    const btn = document.getElementById(`cite-btn-${idx}`);
    if (btn) { btn.textContent = 'Copied!'; btn.classList.add('copied'); setTimeout(() => { btn.textContent = 'Copy APA 7'; btn.classList.remove('copied'); }, 2000); }
  });
}
function downloadRisById(idx) {
  const w = PUB_WORKS[idx];
  const blob = new Blob([buildRIS(w)], { type: 'application/x-research-info-systems' });
  const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  const a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = url; a.download = (w.title||'reference').slice(0,40).replace(/[^a-z0-9]/gi,'_').toLowerCase() + '.ris';
  a.click(); URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
}

function renderWorks(works, fromOrcid) {
  PUB_WORKS.length = 0;
  works.forEach(w => PUB_WORKS.push(w));
  const byYear = {};
  works.forEach(w => { const y = w.year || 'n.d.'; if (!byYear[y]) byYear[y] = []; byYear[y].push(w); });
  let html = ''; let idx = 0;
  for (const year of Object.keys(byYear).sort((a,b) => b - a)) {
    html += `<span class="pub-year-head">${year}</span>`;
    for (const w of byYear[year]) {
      const i = idx++;
      const articleHref = w.doi ? `https://doi.org/${w.doi}` : '#';
      const jUrl = w.journalUrl || articleHref;
      html += `<div class="pub-entry-block">
        ${pubIconHtml(w.doi)}
        <div class="pub-entry-text">
          <a href="${articleHref}" target="_blank" class="pub-title-link">${w.title}</a>
          <div class="pub-meta-row">
            ${w.journal ? `<a href="${jUrl}" target="_blank" class="pub-journal-link">${w.journal}</a>` : ''}
            <button id="cite-btn-${i}" class="pub-cite-btn" onclick="copyApa(${i})">Copy APA 7</button>
            <button class="pub-cite-btn" onclick="downloadRisById(${i})">Download RIS</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>`;
    }
  }
  const footer = document.createElement('div');
  footer.className = 'pub-footer-row';
  footer.innerHTML = (fromOrcid
    ? `<span class="pub-synced-note">Synced from <a href="https://orcid.org/${ORCID_ID}" target="_blank">ORCID</a> · ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-AU',{day:'numeric',month:'long',year:'numeric'})}</span>`
    : `<span class="pub-synced-note">Showing recent publications</span>`)
    + `<a href="${SCHOLAR_URL}" target="_blank" class="pub-scholar-link">View all on Google Scholar →</a>`;
  return { html, footer };
}

async function fetchFullWork(putCode, doi) {
  const [orcidData, jUrl] = await Promise.all([
    (async () => {
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`https://pub.orcid.org/v3.0/${ORCID_ID}/work/${putCode}`, { headers: { Accept: 'application/json' } });
        if (!res.ok) return null;
        const data = await res.json();
        const contributors = data?.contributors?.contributor || data['bulk']?.[0]?.work?.contributors?.contributor || [];
        return {
          authors: formatAuthors(contributors),
          volume:  data?.volume?.value || null,
          issue:   data?.['journal-issue']?.['issue-number']?.value || null,
          pages:   data?.pages?.start?.value ? (data.pages.end?.value ? `${data.pages.start.value}–${data.pages.end.value}` : data.pages.start.value) : null,
        };
      } catch { return null; }
    })(),
    fetchJournalUrl(doi),
  ]);
  return { authors: orcidData?.authors||null, volume: orcidData?.volume||null, issue: orcidData?.issue||null, pages: orcidData?.pages||null, journalUrl: jUrl||null };
}

async function loadOrcidPublications() {
  const container = document.getElementById('orcid-pubs');
  try {
    const res = await fetch(`https://pub.orcid.org/v3.0/${ORCID_ID}/works`, { headers: { Accept: 'application/json' } });
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error();
    const data = await res.json();
    const summaries = [];
    for (const g of (data.group || [])) {
      const s = g['work-summary']?.[0]; if (!s) continue;
      const title   = s.title?.title?.value || 'Untitled';
      const year    = parseInt(s['publication-date']?.year?.value) || 0;
      const journal = s['journal-title']?.value || '';
      let doi = null;
      for (const eid of s['external-ids']?.['external-id'] || []) { if (eid['external-id-type'] === 'doi') { doi = eid['external-id-value']; break; } }
      summaries.push({ title, year, journal, doi, putCode: s['put-code'] });
    }
    if (!summaries.length) throw new Error('empty');
    summaries.sort((a,b) => b.year - a.year);
    const top = summaries.slice(0, MAX_PUBS);
    const full = await Promise.all(top.map(s => fetchFullWork(s.putCode, s.doi)));
    const works = top.map((s,i) => ({ ...s, authors: full[i]?.authors||null, volume: full[i]?.volume||null, issue: full[i]?.issue||null, pages: full[i]?.pages||null, journalUrl: full[i]?.journalUrl||(s.doi?`https://doi.org/${s.doi}`:null) }));
    const { html, footer } = renderWorks(works, true);
    container.innerHTML = html;
    container.appendChild(footer);
  } catch {
    // Fallback to known publications
    const fallback = [
      { title: 'Incremental Validity of Cognitive Impulsivity, Emotional Impulsivity, and Sensation Seeking in the Predictions of ADHD Inattention and Hyperactivity/Impulsivity Symptoms in Adults', year: 2025, journal: 'Journal of Psychopathology and Behavioral Assessment', doi: '10.1007/s10862-025-10252-6', authors: 'Stavropoulos, V., Conkey-Morrison, C., Gomez, R., Griffiths, M. D.', journalUrl: 'https://link.springer.com/journal/10862' },
      { title: 'Stress-coping mechanisms and problematic social media use: A network analysis and differences across men and women', year: 2025, journal: 'Computers in Human Behavior Reports', doi: '10.1016/j.chbr.2025.100848', authors: 'Conkey-Morrison, C., Stavropoulos, V.', journalUrl: 'https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/computers-in-human-behavior-reports' },
      { title: 'Flowing in the net of disordered gaming: A network analysis approach', year: 2025, journal: 'Addictive Behaviors Reports', doi: '10.1016/j.abrep.2025.100606', authors: 'Stavropoulos, V., Conkey-Morrison, C., Griffiths, M. D.', journalUrl: 'https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/addictive-behaviors-reports' },
      { title: 'Examining how gamers connect with their avatars to assess their anxiety: A novel artificial intelligence approach', year: 2024, journal: 'Acta Psychologica', doi: '10.1016/j.actpsy.2024.104298', authors: 'Stavropoulos, V., Conkey-Morrison, C., Griffiths, M. D.', journalUrl: 'https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/acta-psychologica' },
    ];
    const { html, footer } = renderWorks(fallback, false);
    container.innerHTML = html;
    container.appendChild(footer);
  }
}

loadOrcidPublications();
</script>
```
